layout_notes: Central east-west corridor 3000 mm wide divides the building into north and south rows of rooms.
North row (west to east): stair_west, classroom_1, classroom_2, classroom_3, classroom_4, classroom_5, stair_east.
South row (west to east): classroom_6, classroom_7, mens_toilet, lobby, womens_toilet, classroom_8, classroom_9, classroom_10.
Lobby is open to the corridor on its north side, forming an entrance junction.
Each classroom approx. 7500 x 8500 mm, stairwells 3500 x 8500 mm, lobby 6000 x 8500 mm, toilets 4500 x 8500 mm.
Main entrance via 1800 mm double-leaf door on south facade into lobby.
Classrooms have single 1000 mm doors to corridor, toilets have 900 mm doors to lobby.
assumptions: Lobby north side is open to the corridor (no wall segment) so circulation flows freely.
Toilet doors open into lobby, not directly into corridor.
No interior columns; all vertical structure is load-bearing masonry walls.
Flat concrete roof slab covers entire footprint with no overhangs.
Stairwell railings only interior, guarding stair openings.
